titlestmt.titleproper: Ithaca City Federation of Womens Organizations records2643
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M. Warren, G. Solomon

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-08-07 18:27:28 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Ithaca City Federation of Womens Organizations records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Ithaca City Federation of Women\'s Organizations

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Manuscripts, Newspapers, Printed Materials, Reports
did.abstract: Collection includes correspondence, preliminary sketches, and blueprints concerning the construction of the Women's Community Building in Ithaca, New York.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Collection includes correspondence, preliminary sketches, and blueprints concerning the construction of the Women's Community Building in Ithaca, New York (1950s); general and committee correspondence; correspondence and survey materials pertaining to a proposed Ithaca War Memorial (1949); histories of the Federation; Constitution and bylaws; reports; minutes; financial reports; scrapbooks and yearbooks; clippings; program booklets; and other materials.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ithaca City Federation of Women's Organizations records, #2643. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the donor.

did.unittitle: City Federation of Women's Organizations (CFWO) photocopy of office record of incorporation

Agda Osborn, correspondence and drafts, miscellaneous notes
Robert A. Ives property and Baker property
Agda Osborn, correspondence and drafts, miscellaneous notes
Surveys made by War Memorial Committee

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: History, Sept. 26, 1957, Mrs. H.S. Osborn; History, May 22, 1965, A.S. Osborn; 1959 letter to Club Presidents; 1968 Constitution and bylaws; Brochure of proposed building 1958-1959; Report of survey for new building; program booklets; Letter-head, first Federation Community Building; Description of Brooks Mansion, 1875

did.unittitle: Ithaca Daily News, taken over for the day by women
CFWO Constitution and By-laws, drafts and copies, and Board of Directors committees
CFWO miscellaneous correspondence (found in 1910-1916 record book)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Purchase of building; First community rest room; W.F. Willcox speech; Opening of Women's Community Building

did.unittitle: Complete file of annual program booklets
150 year anniversary, City Federation history, by Agda Osborn

Record book of Board of Directors and Executive Board minutes
Blueprints and sketches of proposed Women's Community Building
A History of the City Federation of Women's Organizations of Ithaca, NY 1910-1969 and the Women's Community Building
Scrapbook of clippings of CFWO, collected by Elizabeth Senft, Program Director
Record book of clippings from the Ithaca Journal
